steps.title: Use the discriminant condition
steps.content:
For a quadratic to have no real solutions, its discriminant must be less than $0$. Here $a=-1$, $b=b$, and $c=-841$.
$$b^2-4(-1)(-841)<0$$

steps.title: Choose the greatest integer
steps.content: Since $b$ is a positive integer and $b<58$, the greatest possible value is $57$. The answer is 57.
